creator: daniel@blodan.se
text:
Created attachment 185718
Updates port to 1.7.0

The provided patch does a few things

1) Updates port to 1.7.0 (which comes with python 3 support)

2) Fixes QA issue when python module is not selected, fixes PR 218769

3) Only bundles examples when the provided binding/module is compiled

Passes portlint -AC (three false positivs) + poudriere testport

Changelog:
https://github.com/oetiker/rrdtool-1.x/releases/tag/v1.7.0
